name: Alolan Red - PKMN
description:
«It seems that a certain champion is somewhat lost... Huh. Weird.»

Red is the most feared and respected international Pokémon champion of all time. But even people like champions are capable of accidentally letting things slip through their fingers... And that scenario unfortunately fell uncharacteristically on Red in the busy streets of Alola.

Hi!!! This is a re-uploaded bot from Character AI that I had (like most of them from now on lol)

I plan to fix a lot of things about them soon, like covers and such. I hope you enjoy the bots and have fun with them! ^_^
creator: doomedtofall
